macro.title: The edge that large remodelers leverage in a fragmented industry
macro.what: Residential remodeling tops $500B, yet over 50% of payroll firms earn under $250,000, and M&A remains inconsistent since COVID.
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
macro.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

macro.title: 1 in 5 Homeowners With a Mortgage Could Save Money By Refinancing–But Few Are Taking the Plunge
macro.what: The share of homeowners who are “in the money” for a refinance has hit its highest level in over four years as mortgage rates dip to around 6%
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: More Sellers Test the Market, Hoping For a Spring Surge in Homebuyers
macro.what: After several months of declines, new listings are posting a small improvement
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Inflation Cooled in February, but Markets Are Looking Past It as Iran War Clouds Outlook
macro.what: Takeaway: The February CPI report showed inflation cooling, as expected
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Redfin Economists’ Weekly Take: Mortgage Rates Poised For Volatility As Iran Conflict Escalates and Inflation Data Looms
macro.what: This Week In A Nutshell: Rates may continue to be volatile as the Middle East conflict expands and new inflation data is released
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: New Jersey proposal could reduce senior property tax relief
housing.what: If adopted, the proposal would lower the income cap for property tax relief eligibility to $250,000, down from the current $500,000 limit.
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: Hajime Construction Buys 51% of Utah Builder Wright Homes
housing.what: Japan-based real estate and construction giants have spent the past decade quietly building footholds across the U.S
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Mortgage trade groups urge VA to revise elements of proposed partial claim rules
housing.what: MBA and CHLA asked VA to revise its partial claim and loss-mitigation proposal, pushing for a simpler waterfall and a 180-day lead time.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: ROAD to Housing Act sparks debate over investor limits, housing supply
housing.what: Consumer advocates say new rules for investors are necessary to prevent entire neighborhoods from being dominated by rental homes.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Bryan-College Station is a Texas sleeper market for builders
housing.what: Most people view Texas in two ways: through our large cities or the stereotypical image of a man on a horse
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Private listings: The full truth both sides are avoiding
housing.what: A balanced case for private listings, risks to MLS access and a proposed fix using disclosure now and laws mandating sharing.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Senate passes sweeping housing package in 89–10 vote
housing.what: The Senate passed the ROAD to Housing Act by an 89-10 vote, while trade groups seek changes to BTR rules, FHA loan limits and servicing.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Iran Conflict Stalls Big Purchases Like Homes and Cars For 1 in 4 Americans; Most Are Undeterred
housing.what: The majority of Americans say the military conflict with Iran isn’t impacting their plans to buy a home or car, per a new Redfin survey
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Long-Distance Moves Tick Up: Nearly 1 in 5 House Hunters Are Looking to Relocate
housing.what: Florida dominates the list of most common migration destinations
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

notables.title: Howard Hanna debuts HannaList with MLS aligned early access
notables.what: Howard Hanna debuts HannaList in April in Ohio and Pittsburgh, offering an early access phase alligned with local MLS rules
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Propy expands AI title rollup with Florida acquisition
notables.what: Propy aims to reduce manual workloads by about 70% and allow staff at acquired firms to process roughly twice as many transactions.
notables.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
notables.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.
